name: goodfire

metadata.name: goodfire
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Understand and steer your AI models

documentation:
# Goodfire SDK

Understanding and steering AI models!

# Quickstart

```
pip install goodfire
```

See `examples/quickstart.ipynb`

variables.name: goodfire.features.interfaces.CONDITIONAL_OPERATOR
documentation: Valid operators for feature comparisons: >, <, ==, >=, <=, !=

variables.name: goodfire.features.interfaces.JOIN_OPERATOR
documentation: Logical operators for combining conditions: AND, OR

classes.name: goodfire.variants._experimental.ProgrammableVariant
documentation: A class representing a programmable variant of a base model.

classes.name: goodfire.variants.fast.FeatureEdits
documentation:
A collection of feature modifications with ordered tracking.

This class manages a set of feature edits using an OrderedDict to maintain
the order in which edits were applied.

classes.name: goodfire.variants.fast.Variant

methods.name: goodfire.variants.fast.Variant.set
documentation:
Set or modify feature values in the variant.

Args:
    feature (Union[Feature, FeatureGroup]): Feature(s) to modify
    value (Union[float, bool, None]): Value to apply:
        - float: For numerical adjustments
        - bool: For binary states (pin mode only)
        - None: To clear the modification

    mode (Literal["nudge", "pin"], optional): Modification mode:
        - "nudge": Bias the feature strength
        - "pin": Set the feature strength to a fixed value

        Defaults to "pin".

methods.name: goodfire.variants.fast.Variant.clear
documentation:
Remove modifications for specified feature(s).

Args:
    feature (Union[Feature, FeatureGroup]): Feature(s) to clear modifications for

methods.name: goodfire.variants.fast.Variant.reset
documentation: Remove all feature modifications.

methods.name: goodfire.variants.fast.Variant.json
documentation:
Convert the variant to a JSON-compatible dictionary.

Returns:
    dict: Dictionary containing base model and feature configurations

methods.name: goodfire.variants.fast.Variant.controller
documentation:
Get a controller instance with the variant's modifications applied.

Returns:
    Controller: Controller instance with feature modifications

A class representing a variant of a base model with feature modifications.

This class allows for creating variants of a base model by applying
feature modifications through either nudging or pinning values.

Args:
    base_model (str): Identifier of the base model to create variants from

Attributes:
    base_model (str): The base model identifier
    edits (FeatureEdits): Collection of feature modifications

classes.name: goodfire.features.features.Feature

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.Feature.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new Feature instance.

Args:
    uuid: Unique identifier for the feature
    label: Human-readable label describing the feature
    max_activation_strength: Maximum activation strength of the feature
    index_in_sae: Index position in the SAE

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.Feature.json
documentation:
Convert the feature to a JSON-serializable dictionary.

Returns:
    dict: Feature data with UUID converted to hex string for HTTP transmission

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.Feature.from_json
documentation:
Create a Feature instance from JSON data.

Args:
    data: Dictionary containing feature data with keys:
        - uuid: Feature UUID (string or UUID)
        - label: Feature label
        - max_activation_strength: Maximum activation strength
        - index_in_sae: Index in SAE

Returns:
    Feature: New Feature instance created from the JSON data

A class representing a single feature aka a conceptual unit of the SAE.

Handles individual feature operations and comparisons. Features can be combined
into groups and compared using standard operators.

Attributes:
    uuid (UUID): Unique identifier for the feature
    label (str): Human-readable label describing the feature
    max_activation_strength (float): Maximum activation strength of the feature in the
    training dataset
    index_in_sae (int): Index position in the SAE

classes.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup.pick
documentation:
Create a new FeatureGroup with selected features.

Args:

Returns:

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup.json
documentation:
Convert the feature group to a JSON-serializable dictionary.

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup.from_json
documentation:
Create a FeatureGroup instance from JSON data.

Args:

Returns:

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup.add
documentation:
Add a feature to the group.

Args:
    feature: Feature instance to add to the group

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup.pop
documentation:
Remove and return a feature at the specified index.

Args:
    index: Index of the feature to remove

Returns:
    Feature: The removed feature

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup.union
documentation:
Combine this group with another feature group.

Args:
    feature_group: Another FeatureGroup to combine with

Returns:
    FeatureGroup: New group containing features from both groups

methods.name: goodfire.features.features.FeatureGroup.intersection
documentation:
Create a new group with features common to both groups.

Args:
    feature_group: Another FeatureGroup to intersect with

Returns:
    FeatureGroup: New group containing only features present in both groups

A collection of Feature instances with group operations.

Provides functionality for managing and operating on groups of features, including
union and intersection operations, indexing, and comparison operations.

Represents a conditional expression comparing features.

Handles comparison operations between features, feature groups, and statistics.

methods.name: goodfire.api.features.client.FeaturesAPI.contrast
documentation:
Find features that steer model outputs toward desired responses and away from undesired ones.

Args:
    messages: Chat message history to analyze
    steer_to: Target response(s) to steer towards
    steer_away: Undesired response(s) to steer away from
    model: Base model or variant to analyze
    steer_to_rerank_query: Optional query to rerank features that steer toward target
    steer_away_rerank_query: Optional query to rerank features that steer away from target
    top_k: Number of top features to return for each direction

Returns:
    tuple: Two FeatureGroups containing:
        - Features that help achieve desired responses
        - Features that help avoid undesired responses

Example:
    >>> toward, away = client.features.contrast(
    ...     messages=chat_history,
    ...     steer_to="example desired response",
    ...     steer_away="example undesired response",
    ...     steer_to_rerank_query="desired behavior",
    ...     steer_away_rerank_query="undesired behavior",
    ...     top_k=10
    ... )

modules.name: goodfire.utils

functions.name: goodfire.utils.comparison.StreamingMultiplexer
documentation:
Display multiple streaming outputs simultaneously in a grid layout.

Uses ThreadPoolExecutor to concurrently process multiple streaming generators
and display their outputs in a grid of text areas. Each stream gets its own
text area that updates in real-time.

Args:
    streaming_generators: List of generators yielding StreamingChatCompletionChunks
    boxes_per_row: Number of text areas to display per row. Defaults to 2.

Example:
    >>> generators = [chat.stream() for chat in chats]
    >>> StreamingMultiplexer(generators, boxes_per_row=3)

functions.name: goodfire.controller.controller.filter_controller
documentation: Function to filter controller with nudge and pin, will add comments.
This function filters out previous interventions whenever a pin is found,
and merges nudges.

classes.name: goodfire.utils._experimental.LatentExplorer

methods.name: goodfire.utils._experimental.LatentExplorer._setup_3d_controls
documentation: Set up keyboard controls for 3D plot rotation

Interactive visualization tool for exploring feature relationships in latent space.

Uses PCA dimensionality reduction and interactive plotting to visualize feature
neighborhoods and relationships. Supports clicking features to explore their local
neighborhoods.

Args:
    client (Client): Client instance for API communication
    model (Union[str, VariantInterface]): Model or variant to explore
